response.justification: The candidate is a strong, versatile senior engineer, but the profile does not match this role's core requirements. Professional C++ experience is limited to roughly seven months at National Instruments in 2014-2015 (plus a thesis project), far short of the mandatory 5-10 years of hands-on Windows C++ development. There is no SQL Server or Oracle experience listed (MongoDB/MySQL instead), and no Fixed Income, derivatives, or capital-markets domain exposure — RIDE Capital was retail investment fintech, not investment banking. The bulk of the career is TypeScript/Node.js and DLang systems work, which does not substitute for the mandatory stack.
strengths: Deep low-latency systems experience (DLang async I/O services handling millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby)
Strong engineering practices: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and testing tooling authorship
Broad polyglot background with proven ability to pick up new stacks quickly
concerns: Only ~7 months of professional C++ experience, and not recent (2014-2015), versus a mandatory 5-10 years on Windows
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; database background is MongoDB/MySQL
No Fixed Income, capital markets, or investment banking domain experience; no Summit, Kafka/MQ, or related exposure

key_factors.factor: Missing capital markets / fixed income domain
Strong general systems and engineering fundamentals
